title: Disable Caching and Autocomplete on Login Page via Session settings
remediation:
1. From Setup, in the Quick Find box, enter Session Settings, then select Session Settings.
2. Uncheck Enable caching and autocomplete on login page.
remediationImpact: If enabled, after initial login, usernames are automatically populated into the Username field on the login page. If the user selects Remember me on the login page, the username persists after the session expires or the user logs out. The username also displays on the Switcher.
